name: france-de-macron
description: Dashboard satirique & data-driven — French Cooked Index™

scripts.validate: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:scripts && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check
scripts.db:types: pnpm dlx supabase@latest gen types typescript --local > apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp && mv apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts
scripts.db:types:linked: pnpm dlx supabase@latest gen types typescript --linked > apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp && mv apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.tmp apps/web/src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts
